description: A plain candid field-arrest photograph with no designed text overlay. On a city sidewalk under a clear blue sky, an ICE officer in a green tactical vest marked 'ERO' (and another partially visible officer at right whose face is blurred) detain a man in a gray T-shirt and black track pants with white side stripes; he is handcuffed beside a white SUV. The background shows a wide street with traffic lights, palm trees, commercial buildings, and an 'IBC' bank sign. The tweet ties it to the weeklong Harlingen, Texas operation that produced 72 arrests. Routine documentary enforcement photo, not a designed graphic.
